query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A close-up portrait of a young person with long light-colored hair, wearing a pink garment with small reflective embellishments, eyes looking downward with visible eyelashes.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A soft-focus portrait of a young person with long light-colored hair, wearing a pink garment with small reflective embellishments, eyes looking downward with visible eyelashes. The image is rendered with extreme intentional blur that dissolves edges into haze. Faded, muted tones with low vibrancy give a washed-out, dreamy quality. Warm light leak streaks wash across the upper corners and edges of the frame, evoking analog film housing defects and lo-fi authenticity.
